features: Fantastic quality print. Ready to be framed.
Includes 23 pre printed signatures / autographs of legendary players like Virgil, Salah, and Alisson Becker.
Striking Display: The jerseys are artfully arranged in a visually appealing layout against a backdrop of Anfield stadium.
description: Calling all Liverpool F.C. fans! Elevate your support for the Reds with this exceptional 2024/2025 squad Signed print. Featuring the iconic red shirts emblazoned with the names, numbers and autographs of your favourite players, including Virgil, Salah, Gomez, and more, this beautiful print allows you to proudly showcase your allegiance.
